nodes.title: List Accounts
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/accounts with Authorization header. Returns array of accounts with {id, name, code, accountType, parentId, currencyId, allowedLinks[]}. Supports hierarchical tree structure with parent-child relationships.

nodes.title: Get Account Details
nodes.description: GET /api/accounts/:id with Authorization header. Returns single account {id, name, code, accountType, parentId, currencyId}. Returns 404 with {error: 'الحساب غير موجود'} if not found.

nodes.title: Create Account
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/accounts with {name, code, accountType, parentId?, currencyId, allowedLinks?[]}. Inserts account record and optional allowed links. Returns created account object. Returns 400 if validation fails.

nodes.title: Update Account
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/accounts/:id with {name?, code?, accountType?, parentId?, currencyId?, allowedLinks?[]}. Updates account fields and replaces allowed links if provided. Returns updated account.

nodes.title: Delete Account
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/accounts/:id. Removes account, its allowed links, and account balances. Returns 200 with {message: 'تم الحذف'}. Returns 404 if account not found.

nodes.title: Get Allowed Links
nodes.description: GET /api/accounts/:id/allowed-links. Returns array of linked account IDs that this account can transfer to/from. Each link contains {id, fromAccountId, toAccountId}.

nodes.title: Get Allowed Targets
nodes.description: GET /api/accounts/:id/allowed-targets. Returns array of account objects that are valid transfer targets for the given account, based on allowed links configuration.
